name: Herman Sourdough Croutons
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Loaf Herman Bread, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with oils in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook until the butter stops sputtering and add garlic, herbs, and salt; cook for 1 minute.
3. Add bread cubes, tossing gently to coat evenly until all the butter is absorbed.
4. Spread bread cubes in a single layer on a baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature with salad; cool completely before storing.
